theme_and_archetype.reasoning: For a tax filing and finance company, users need to feel trust, calm, and stability. A dark tech theme feels too clinical or risky. Organic & Earthy brings a warm, grounded, 'Old Money Tech' aesthetic that reassures users their data is safe.

headings.usage_rules: Use tracking-tight for all headings. Never center by default. Use for H1, H2, H3.

body.usage_rules: Clean, highly legible geometric sans for financial data and dense text.

marketing_pages.grid: Bento Grid Protocol (MODE A). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 to gap-12. Asymmetrical balance.
marketing_pages.padding: Generous. Sections should use py-24 or py-32. Containers must have internal p-8.
marketing_pages.alignment: Left-aligned for paragraphs, optical alignment for buttons with icons.

dashboards.grid: Control Room Grid (MODE B). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. gap-6.
dashboards.padding: Compact but breathable. Cards use p-6.
dashboards.surfaces: Flat Solid backgrounds. NO Glassmorphism (financial data must not refract). 1px subtle borders (border-black/5). Sharp or max 8px (rounded-md) border radius.

libraries.ui: Shadcn UI (Customized to remove generic Vercel look)

rules.buttons: Accent color (#C86B53) for primary CTAs like 'File Taxes' or 'Log In'. Hover state must be a lighter hue. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-[#C86B53].
rules.cards: In dashboards, flat background, 1px border. On hover, slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-sm.
rules.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, Form. Left-aligned labels. Clear validation colors.
rules.navigation: Sticky header with backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 on marketing pages. Solid background on dashboards. Navigation links must be visible on desktop.

image_urls.description: Business professionals in modern open office. Use for main landing page hero.
Professional team collaborating. Use for About Us section.
Magnifying glass and financial charts. Use for Services or feature block.
Dark abstract financial chart. Use sparingly as an accent background for a promo card in the dashboard.

media.image_usage_rules: Hero images must use a gradient overlay for text readability (e.g. bg-gradient-to-r from-[#123524]/80 to-transparent). Max overlay opacity 50% for solid black/white.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the 'Organic & Earthy' color palette. DO NOT use generic SaaS blue or purple.
Marketing pages MUST be heavily customized using pure HTML/Tailwind with asymmetrical bento grids.
Dashboards MUST use Shadcn UI components but customized to use the brand colors, removing the default black/white Vercel look.
Use Playfair Display for all H1/H2/H3 headings and Manrope for body text. Add them to the global CSS.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).
Never use generic placeholder images. Use the provided image_urls.
For the file upload feature in the user portal, implement a clear, drag-and-drop styled zone using Shadcn components.
Admin portal should prioritize 'North star metric in the top-left' and use hierarchical KPIs before secondary details.
